/home/runner/work/cowel/cowel/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -g -Os -fno-exceptions -static-libc++ -stdlib=libc++ -s WASM=1 -s ENVIRONMENT=web -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s ALLOW_TABLE_GROWTH=1 -s AUTO_JS_LIBRARIES=0 -s STANDALONE_WASM=1 --no-entry "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/bash.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/cowel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/cpp.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/css.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/diff.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/ebnf.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/html.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/js.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/json.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/kotlin.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/llvm.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/lua.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/markdown.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/nasm.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/python.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/rust.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/tex.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/lang/xml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/chars.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/io.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/parse_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/ulight.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ulight-wasm.dir/src/main/cpp/wasm.cpp.o" -o ulight.wasm
